Patient Reviews

Unveil why our patients consider Buford Dental the top choice for premier dental care in Buford, GA. Your 5-Star Rated Buford Dentist!

Write Your Review

I’ve been a patient at Buford Dental for 3 years now and I am so happy to have found them! From start to finish, the entire team is friendly, efficient and everyone works together. I appreciate their honesty and transparency and recommend them to everyone I know.

Brittany Fennell

Buford Dental deserves every star in this review! Dr. Bui and the incredible hygenist team, Holly and Carla, provided an unparalleled dental experience. Highly recommend Buford Dental for top-notch care and compassion!

Elle Morris

Our Dental Services

Our clinic is well-equipped with up-to-date facilities to guarantee an unparalleled dental care experience.

View All Services

Dental Implants

Permanent solutions for missing teeth, restoring function and aesthetics with durable titanium posts.

Know More

Cosmetic Dentistry

Enhancing smiles through procedures like teeth whitening, veneers, and dental implants, boosting confidence.

Know More

Family Dentistry

Providing oral care for patients of all ages, promoting lifelong dental health and wellness for the entire family.

Know More

Root Canal

Treating infected or damaged tooth pulp, saving the tooth, and relieving pain through precise sealing. 

Know More

Our Team

At Buford Dental, we aim to establish trust and nurture enduring connections with our patients. Dr. Tran, Dr. Duong, and Dr. Bryan Bui are pivotal in this mission, dedicated to delivering compassionate treatment and personalized care that prioritizes the well-being and satisfaction of every individual. The collaboration and support of our entire team strengthen teamwork.

Know More

Why Choose Us?

 We offer you exceptional, comprehensive dental care driven by our unrelenting passion and commitment to addressing all your family’s dental needs.

Comprehensive Dental Care

We offer tailored services for all ages.

Patient-Centered Approach

Your comfort is our highest priority.

Evidence-Based Dentistry

Our services are based on clinical expertise.

State-of-the-Art Facilities

Modern approach for superior treatment.

About Us

At Buford Dental in Buford, GA, our talented team of dentists truly enjoy welcoming new patients to our family. With our Buford GA dentist and team, you are assured of treatment options that stem from evidence-based dentistry. We make it a point to help our patients fully comprehend these choices so they can make the best decision for their dental health.

Know More
